task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface is visible with 'E-Commerce Platform' displayed in the top navigation bar or project sidebar.

task_completion.description: Open the Work Packages module within the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view displays the Work Packages list or table for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project.

task_completion.description: Identify work packages containing 'Search' in their subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text filter or search query for 'Search' is active in the Work Packages view, narrowing down the list to the relevant target work packages.

task_completion.description: Add the 'search-initiative' tag to the identified work packages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen entering 'search-initiative' into the Tags input field, either within a bulk edit modal or on the individual work package detail views.

task_completion.description: Ensure only the target work packages are tagged with 'search-initiative'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final work packages list shows the 'search-initiative' tag applied to the 5 work packages containing 'Search' in their subject, with no other work packages displaying this tag.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface interacting with the OpenProject web application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, rails console, or SQL queries are used to update the work packages.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the tagging interface rather than manipulating the DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard UI elements like dropdown suggestions for tags, bulk edit modals, or OpenProject success notification toasts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 5 work packages in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project that contain the case-insensitive word 'Search' in their subject. The verifier must strictly check that ONLY these 5 work packages are tagged with 'search-initiative', and no other work packages are modified.
